name: review-learning-remote-path-rendering
title: Render remote review paths without local path validation
description: Prevent generated review-learning snapshots from treating historical GitHub review paths as current local documentation references, with renderer regression coverage and normal shipped-payload release handling.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Implemented a line-preserving managed-block mask for remote review provenance, safe code-span fences for backtick-containing paths, focused regressions, and the 0.21.5 release ledger. All seven disposable fleet candidates and the canonical check pass.
